# data.fetch_data.load_timeseries { #spotforecast2_safe.data.fetch_data.load_timeseries }

```python
data.fetch_data.load_timeseries(data_home=None)
```

Load the actual-load time series from ``interim/energy_load.csv``.
Reads the ``Actual Load`` column, converts the index to a UTC
``DatetimeIndex`` with hourly frequency, and fills any missing
values with forward/backward fill.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                                                                                             | Description                                                      | Default   |
|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| data_home | [Optional](`typing.Optional`)\[[Union](`typing.Union`)\[[str](`str`), [Path](`pathlib.Path`)\]\] | Root data directory.  If None, resolved via ``get_data_home()``. | `None`    |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                     | Description                                                     |
|--------|------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | [pd](`pandas`).[Series](`pandas.Series`) | pd.Series: Hourly actual-load series indexed by UTC timestamps. |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type                                     | Description                                    |
|--------|------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------|
|        | [FileNotFoundError](`FileNotFoundError`) | If ``interim/energy_load.csv`` does not exist. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> import os, tempfile, shutil
>>> import pandas as pd
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.data.fetch_data import (
...     load_timeseries, get_package_data_home,
... )
>>> tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp()
>>> os.environ["SPOTFORECAST2_DATA"] = tmp
>>> interim = os.path.join(tmp, "interim")
>>> os.makedirs(interim, exist_ok=True)
>>> demo = get_package_data_home() / "demo01.csv"
>>> df = pd.read_csv(demo)
>>> df = df.rename(columns={
...     "Time": "Time (UTC)",
...     "Actual": "Actual Load",
...     "Forecast": "Forecasted Load",
... })
>>> df.to_csv(os.path.join(interim, "energy_load.csv"), index=False)
>>> y = load_timeseries()
>>> isinstance(y, pd.Series)
True
>>> y.index.tz is not None
True
>>> shutil.rmtree(tmp)
>>> del os.environ["SPOTFORECAST2_DATA"]
```
